creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: I'm not familiar with Sane.  The obvious thing to check is that it can access the USB device.  CUPS installs a devd file in /usr/local/etc/devd/cups.conf.  This sets the permissions on USB printers to root:cups 660.  You may have to add users to group cups.  Or maybe you need to add the saned user to group cups.
